headline: Jabil, CTS, Plexus, Kyndryl, and Amphenol Stocks Trade Up, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks jumped in the afternoon session after oil prices fell sharply following reports of de-escalating tensions between the U.S. and Iran.
